CONTENT.Career statistics: As of matches played on 31 July 2020
CONTENT.International career: Seka was born in France to an Ivorian father and Guinean mother. On 23 April 2018, he agreed to represent the Guinea national team.Seka made his debut for Guinea in a 1–0 2019 Africa Cup of Nations qualification win over Central African Republic on 9 September 2018.

SUMMARY: Ernest Seka Boka (born 22 June 1987) is a Guinean professional footballer who most recently played as a defender for AS Nancy Lorraine.
